issuer_name_as_stated: Yatharth Hospital & Trauma Care Services Limited
extraction_reasoning: The litigation table reports criminal proceedings against the Company (2), other Directors (1), Promoters (2), and Subsidiaries (1), totaling 6; all “By” rows are nil and excluded. The statutory/regulatory and tax columns are nil for all against rows, so regulatory actions and tax proceedings against the company/subsidiaries are each 0; the quantified group amount includes ₹5.00 million against the Company and ₹0.74 million against Subsidiaries, while the ₹0.74 million against Promoters is excluded, giving ₹5.74 million = ₹0.574 crore. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated consolidated “Total” of ₹2,358.44 million as at March 31, 2023, converted to ₹235.844 crore without re-summing line items. Concentration percentages disclosed relate to COVID-19 revenue and hospital/service segments, not company-wide top-five or top-ten customers; the relevant denominator is revenue from operations, with Fiscal 2023 the latest full fiscal period. Litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 100 (₹1 million = ₹0.1 crore).
